result.finding: No additional system packages installed in the container. The final runtime image uses eclipse-temurin:8-jre as-is with no apt-get, apk, or yum package installations in the Dockerfile.
evidence: Dockerfile final stage: no apt-get install, apt install, apk add, yum install, or dnf install commands
Dockerfile build stage: no package installation commands (Maven already included in maven:3.9.6-eclipse-temurin-8 base)
Only instructions in final stage: WORKDIR, COPY --from=build, EXPOSE, ENV, ENTRYPOINT
values: Packages available: those bundled in eclipse-temurin:8-jre base image only
